title: MedBed Healing Technology
summary: From Medical Team drones to the Immortal Chamber — the archive's healing technology, performed live in the sessions.
markdown:
**MedBed technology** — "healing technology, AI-assisted device, extraterrestrial technological
advancement" (February 2020) — is not just described in the archive: it is *performed*. The
fullest sequence is the healing of [Andy Basiago](/lore/andy-basiago/) in the April 23, 2020
session, narrated step by step: *"Bringing in the Medical Team… the Medical Team drones are
beginning the regeneration… 15%… 35%… injecting the medical nano-probes… replacement of
skeletal structure… replacement of internal organs… 80%… replacement of your neural link…
restructuring of your life contract: rewriting it… 100%."* An August 2020 group healing runs
the same protocol at scale — a "Rainbow Chamber" activated, medical nanites injected into all
present, brainwave frequencies tuned, "100% of all entities restored."

The sessions name the hardware behind the rite: the **Immortal Chamber** — a "Crystal Chamber
System," photonic, built of nanite-grown "Protomolecule crystals" — which takes in damaged DNA
and returns *"the Rainbow Body unit… impervious to aging."* Nearer-term, they forecast
"rapid body-part cloning" for regenerative medicine, and teach the kitchen-table versions:
[water reprogramming](/lore/manifestation/) ("Baramay, please change this water into
medicine") and the nanobot "immune serum" of the pandemic sessions.

The technology has law as well as power: asked to straighten a participant's hip, Unimetrix 1
declines — altering the body that far would rewrite her
[life contract](/lore/reincarnation/), which "requires the approval of higher intelligence:
the [Elohim](/lore/elohim/)." Even the Immortal Chamber, in the archive, works inside the
rules of incarnation.
